name: Peach Glace Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Package (3 ounces) Cream Cheese, Fruit Protector
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake the pie shell.
2. Mash enough peaches to measure 1 cup.
3. Mix sugar and cornstarch in a 2-quart saucepan.
4. Gradually stir in water and red food color into the mixture.
5. Stir in mashed peaches.
6. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and boils.
7. Boil and stir for 1 minute; then cool.
8. Beat cream cheese until smooth.
9. Spread cream cheese in pie shell.
10. Fill the shell with remaining peaches.
11. Pour cooked peach mixture over top.
12. Refrigerate about 3 hours or until set.
8 SERVINGS; 330 CALORIES PER SERVING.
